utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final package: (1) destination is clearly specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal'; (2) travel_dates are specified as '2024-07-01 to 2024-07-05'; (3) transportation includes flight details and cost; (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, nights, and cost; (5) activities include list and cost; (6) additional_services include restaurant and cost; (7) total_budget includes total cost, currency, budget limit, and remaining. All items are present and fully detailed according to the format.
